description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style bunk bed constructed primarily from metal, featuring three stacked sleeping platforms. The frame is composed of rectangular metal tubing, with guardrails running along the upper edges for safety. One end of the bed incorporates a built-in staircase with open risers, providing access to the upper bunks. The bed stands on wide, flat metal feet for stability, and the overall structure is open and utilitarian, with no visible mattress or bedding. The surfaces have a matte, slightly rough metallic finish, and the design is highly functional, suitable for communal or institutional urban environments such as shelters or hostels.
description: A heavy-duty, triple-level metal bunk bed with integrated stairs and guardrails, finished in matte gray. The design is open, industrial, and highly functional, with no visible mattress or bedding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the end of the bed with the staircase and the three stacked bunks, highlighting the open guardrails and sturdy metal frame.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the bed, the three sleeping platforms, and the continuous guardrails along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the opposite end from the stairs, showing the open frame and the alignment of the bunks.
description_view_3: Side view from the staircase side, clearly showing the steps and the open structure of the bed frame.
